sentence: En la comunidad todos siembran papa y quinua.
ipa: en la komuniðað toðos sjembɾan papa i kinwa
gloss_en: In the community everyone sows potato and quinoa.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La chola carga su wawa en la espalda.
ipa: la tʃola kaɾɡa su wawa en la espalda
gloss_en: The chola carries her baby on her back.
notes: final [u]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El yatiri lee la suerte en las hojas de coca.
ipa: el ʝatiɾi lee la sweɾte en las oxas de koka
gloss_en: The yatiri reads fortunes in the coca leaves.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Nosotros pastamos las llamas cerca del río.
ipa: nosotɾos pastamos las ʝamas seɾka del rio
gloss_en: We graze the llamas near the river.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi taita trabaja la chacra desde temprano.
ipa: mi tajta tɾaβaxa la tʃakɾa desde tempɾano
gloss_en: My father works the plot from early on.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La lluvia riega los sembríos del altiplano.
ipa: la ʝubja rjeɣa los sembɾios del altiplano
gloss_en: The rain waters the altiplano's crops.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Ese camino sube al pueblo por la ladera.
ipa: ese kamino suβe al pweblo poɾ la laðeɾa
gloss_en: That road climbs to the town along the slope.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Comemos chuño y queso después del trabajo.
ipa: komemos tʃuɲo i keso despues del tɾaβaxo
gloss_en: We eat chuño and cheese after work.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los comuneros celebran la fiesta con música.
ipa: los komuneɾos selebɾan la fjesta kon musika
gloss_en: The community members celebrate the feast with music.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El niño arrea las ovejas hacia el corral.
ipa: el niɲo area las obexas asja el koral
gloss_en: The boy drives the sheep towards the pen.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Vos vas a la feria del domingo en el pueblo?
ipa: bos bas a la feɾja del dominɡo en el pweblo
gloss_en: Are you going to Sunday's market in the town?
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La señora vende hierbas en el mercado.
ipa: la seɲoɾa bende jeɾbas en el meɾkaðo
gloss_en: The lady sells herbs in the market.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Hierve la sopa de maíz sobre el fogón.
ipa: jeɾbe la sopa de mais sobɾe el foɣon
gloss_en: The corn soup boils on the hearth.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El cerro guarda la nieve todo el año.
ipa: el sero ɡaɾda la njebe toðo el aɲo
gloss_en: The hill keeps the snow all year.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi abuelo cuenta historias junto al fuego.
ipa: mi aβwelo kwenta istoɾjas xunto al fweɣo
gloss_en: My grandfather tells stories by the fire.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Trae la chuspa con la coca para el viaje.
ipa: tɾae la tʃuspa kon la koka paɾa el bjaxe
gloss_en: Bring the coca pouch for the journey.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El zorro anda rondando por los sembradíos.
ipa: el soro anda rondando poɾ los sembɾaðios
gloss_en: The fox is prowling around the fields.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Corre el viento fuerte sobre la meseta.
ipa: kore el bjento fweɾte sobɾe la meseta
gloss_en: A strong wind blows over the plateau.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Teje una lliclla con lana de alpaca.
ipa: texe una ʝikʝa kon lana de alpaka
gloss_en: She weaves a lliclla with alpaca wool.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Prende una vela frente a la imagen del santo.
ipa: pɾende una bela fɾente a la imaxen del santo
gloss_en: Light a candle before the saint's image.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.
